title: Least Threatening Angel
wikitext:
[]: Least Threatening Angel             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat May 30, 2009 4:03 pm What angel would you consider has the least threating appearance? I would say Leliel. If Leliel appeared out of nowhere, was floating above a city in the real world, and things weren't sinking into its body, people would probably just stare. In fact if I didn't know what it was capable of, I would probably walk toward it, thinking it was some kind of giant striped balloon.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat May 30, 2009 4:07 pm Kaworu. "He's just zis guy, you know..."

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 30, 2009 4:10 pm Strictly in terms of appearance? That'd be Kaworu, hands down. Yeah he looks like Rei, but at least he looks human unlike the rest of his siblings/offspring.

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Sat May 30, 2009 4:35 pm After Kaworu, I would pick Ramiel. He's just a giant geometrical shape.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat May 30, 2009 5:02 pm DummyPlug wrote: After Kaworu, I would pick Ramiel. He's just a giant geometrical shape.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat May 30, 2009 5:03 pm Yeah, Kaworu, he's/she's just a bitch. That, and Sand-Dolphin.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat May 30, 2009 7:38 pm The kitten killer. After him it would be the Tentacle rape angel. -The one that got Rei- After that one it would be the other tentacle rape angel. -Shammy-

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat May 30, 2009 8:47 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: After him it would be the Tentacle rape angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat May 30, 2009 9:33 pm nuff said

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat May 30, 2009 9:56 pm ^ I once showed that picture to one of my science teachers, and he found it particularly appealing.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat May 30, 2009 10:20 pm Edit: Crap missread the title thread.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Sat May 30, 2009 10:50 pm yeah kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat May 30, 2009 11:29 pm I could probably fight a huge monster but I couldn't fight Kaworu he looks too human, it would break my heart anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsachoul » Sun May 31, 2009 1:25 am Kaworu. You would have a hard time convincing the UN that you needed to build superweapons on legs to fight an albino effeminate boy. Sure he is a little creepy, but I don't feel threatened by him.

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Sun May 31, 2009 2:44 am For some reason, Zeruel's face looks friendly to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun May 31, 2009 2:23 pm Forget what I said before since I missread the thread for something else. I would go with Kaworu since he did not too much other then be friends with Shinji and took control over Unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Sun May 31, 2009 6:18 pm But Kaworu was the only angel to actually complete his mission. Well, he didn't but he could have if he didn't go all soft at the end. I would say Shaaquiel is kind of goofy looking. All the bright colors and hand type thingies at the end.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun May 31, 2009 6:43 pm After Israfel split in half, I had a sneaking suspicion throughout the Israfel episode that Shinji and [someone else] would do a synchronized dance in the Evas. So Israfel for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 31, 2009 9:02 pm Lilin. They're small and squishy and they die so easy. They like to compensate with toys, though. Need to mind their toys a bit.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jun 01, 2009 8:00 am Just for the hell of it, I'll bring Arael to the stand. What's so threatening about a bird of light all the way up in space? It's not like it was doing anything until the Evas provoked it, IIRC. Joseph the PRPD wrote: After that one it would be the other tentacle rape angel. -Shammy-
